column8: Located in the prestigious Pristine Bay community, this exclusive development features two modern condo buildings with 76 total units. Each residence offers sweeping views of Roatán’s North Shore and the world-class Black Pearl Golf Course. The project also includes four spacious 2,500 sq ft penthouse units, each with a private pool. Owners enjoy access to Pristine Bay’s resort-style amenities, including a private beach, beach club, restaurants, dive shop, tennis courts, golf course, putting green, community pool, and 24/7 security. Set within a thriving gated community, it offers effortless island living with luxury, leisure, and lifestyle at your doorstep.
